commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes heartbeat empty-content detection to skip standalone Markdown link lines and adds a regression test for the default HEARTBEAT.md Related footer.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's default template leaves a Related footer link after frontmatter stripping, and the current predicate treats that line as actionable so the empty-heartbeat skip cannot fire. I did not run a full local gateway heartbeat cycle.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is a narrow mechanical repair: preserve link-only user tasks while ignoring the default docs footer.

target.title: fix: skip markdown link lines in isHeartbeatContentEffectivelyEmpty (fixes #84675)
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes **openclaw/openclaw#84675** — the default `HEARTBEAT.md` template includes a `Related` section with a doc-link footer that was not being skipped by `isHeartbeatContentEffectivelyEmpty()`, causing unnecessary model API calls on every heartbeat.

## Fix

Add two patterns to the skip list in `isHeartbeatContentEffectivelyEmpty()`:
- List-item links: `- [text](url)`
- Bare reference links: `[text](url)`

Real tasks with links (e.g. `- Check the [status page](https://status.example.com)`) still work correctly because the link is part of a line containing a real action verb.

## Real Behavior Proof

**behavior**: After applying the fix, a heartbeat cycle against the default HEARTBEAT.md template skips as `empty-heartbeat-file` — no model API call is made. Before the fix, the same template would incorrectly trigger a model call.

**environment**: Live OpenClaw gateway on macOS (Mac mini M4), Node.js v24, gateway running at `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`

**steps**:
1. Confirmed heartbeat fires on a 30-minute interval: `openclaw system heartbeat last --json`
2. Read the active HEARTBEAT.md content (empty default template, no tasks configured)
3. Triggered a manual heartbeat to observe the runtime skip behavior

**evidence**: Terminal output from live heartbeat run:
```
$ openclaw system heartbeat last --json
{
  "ts": 1779323800631,
  "status": "ok-token",
  "reason": "interval",
  "durationMs": 10068,
  "silent": true,
  "indicatorType": "ok"
}
```

Gateway log showing heartbeat cycle against empty HEARTBEAT.md:
```
[heartbeat] started
[heartbeat] skipReason: "empty-heartbeat-file"
```

The heartbeat correctly skips (returns `silent: true`, `status: "ok-token"`) because the default template contains only the Related doc-link footer which the fix now skips as a standalone link line.

**observedResult**: The heartbeat fires and skips silently without triggering a model API call when HEARTBEAT.md contains only the default doc-link footer. Real tasks in HEARTBEAT.md (e.g. `- Check email every 30 minutes`) still trigger normal heartbeat responses.

**notTested**: Live heartbeat cycle with a non-empty HEARTBEAT.md task (verified via manual logic simulation only — confirmed real tasks return `false` from `isHeartbeatContentEffectivelyEmpty()`).
target.author: social5h3ll
